title: Seshat BI Decision Store file
description: Shape of each of the three store files (.seshat/semantic-decisions.yaml, .seshat/kpi-contracts.yaml, .seshat/cleaning-rules.yaml): a top-level object holding decision records and batch approval sets. Fail closed: a file or record that does not validate is treated as unresolved and blocks dependent stages.

id.description: Stable slug: <decision_type>.<scope-slug>[.<n>]; unique within the project store.

decision_type.description: Critical types listed in enum; non-critical free types allowed via the pattern branch (only non-critical types may be batch-approved, DS3).

confidence.description: Agent proposal confidence only. Never approval; never surfaced as a readiness signal.

evidence.description: Repo-relative paths or artifact ids. Raw suspected-PII values are forbidden in committed artifacts.

scope_selector.description: At least one list must be non-empty. Used for both a decision's scope and an approval's reviewed_scope.

approval.description: Valid only when ALL fields are present, evidence resolves, and the approver's authority class is eligible for the decision_type per contracts/knowledge/approval-authority.yaml. An agent identity never satisfies approved_by.

approved_by.description: Named human plus authority class token, e.g. "Ahmed Shaaban (data_owner)" (RS1 shape).

evidence_identity.description: Map of each cited evidence ref to its content identity (hash or revision) captured at approval time. Staleness (clarify Q1) = an artifact's current identity differs from the recorded one.

reviewed_scope.description: What the approver actually reviewed; must cover the record's scope.

batch.description: One low-risk batch confirmation. Critical decision types are never members (DS3); excluded items become individual pending questions (clarify Q4).

members.description: Decision ids approved by this batch.

excluded.description: Decision ids the owner pulled out before confirming; each becomes an individual pending question.

confirmed_by.description: Named human plus authority class token (RS1 shape).

evidence.description: What the batch presented to the owner.
